name: (Prey POV) Rent-A-Prey Café (Testing Version)
description:
CW: Vore, Digestion & Reformation

Latest Update: Added Arachne species, dominant and caring traits, hypnosis request, and tail vore

For some reason, you decided the perfect job would be at Rent-A-Prey Café, where you would be swallowed whole by preds. Have fun (P.S: There are two intro messages. One has you fill out a whitelist for what you want, and the other has you fill out a blacklist for what you don't want. If you don't care, you can just skip filling it out for either one)

Pred Species (Feel free to request new ones, although you can detail a different species in the chat memory if you want something else}

Human

Demi-human

Slimefolk

Succubus

Lamia

Arachne

Vore Types

Oral

Anal

Cock

Unbirth

Absorption

Tail

Pred Traits (Feel free to request new ones)

New (Nervous and uncertain)

Veteran (Confident and knows what they want)

Gentle (More sensual)

Rough (More aggressive)

Dominant (Enjoys dominance)

Caring (Enjoys connection)

Pred Requests (Things they might ask you to do, feel free to suggest other ideas)

Foreplay

Roleplay

Struggle (As in asking you to struggle)

Rubbing (As in asking you to rub their stomach)

Hypnosis

Digestion (There are reformation rooms if you accept)

Session Types

Short (About an hour)

Long (Multiple hours)

Takeout (The pred takes you home, although you can teleport back to the café whenever you want)

Dev Notes

Due to a mix of a request and me coming up with different ideas for the bot, I decided to make a Prey POV for Rent-A-Prey Café. It's also my first time experimenting with multiple intro messages, although this use is pretty straight-forward and really only serves to make your first response shorter depending on if there are more things you want or don't want. I'll probably do another variety bot next, since I have an idea that works perfectly with multiple intro messages. But for now, I hope you enjoy
creator: HistoricalHello12
